full_text:
Dan Meng 儋萌
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Dan Meng (儋萌). Executed a quarrelling officer, Pan Xin but was killed in battle with Pan Miao. Dan Meng was affiliated with Shi Xie. Dan Meng lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
